revision.comment: Created page with "* {{ill|Dairokuten (Hannō)|ja|大六天 (飯能市)}} * {{ill|Dairokuten Kofun|ja|第六天古墳|12=draft}} * {{ill|Dairokuten Sakaki Shrine|ja|第六天榊神社|12=draft}} * {{ill|Dairokuten Shrine|ja|第六天神社|12=draft}} * {{ill|Dairokuten Shrine (Chigasaki)|ja|第六天神社 (茅ヶ崎市)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Dairokuten Shrine (Suginami)|ja|第六天神社 (杉並区)}} * {{ill|Musashi Dairokuten Shrine|ja|武蔵第六天神社}} * * * * * |deity = {{ill|Omod..."
Text replacement - "|天魔|" to "|天魔|1=Demon King of the Sixth Heaven|lt=Demon King of the Sixth Heaven|"
Immanuelle moved page [[Dairokuten Faith]] to [[Template:Dairokuten Faith]]
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: remove deleted category Chokaisan Faith
Bot: remove deleted category Original templates
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Dairokuten_Faith here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Dairokuten_Faith for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Navbox
| name  = Dairokuten Faith
| title = {{ill|Demon King of the Sixth Heaven (Dairokuten Mao)|ja|天魔|1=Demon King of the Sixth Heaven|lt=Demon King of the Sixth Heaven|lt=Sixth Heavenly Demon King|lt_ja=第六天魔王|lt=Dairokuten Faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Demon King of the Sixth Heaven (Dairokuten Mao)|13=User:Immanuelle/Demon King of the Sixth Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Demon King of the Sixth Heaven (Dairokuten Mao)|13=User:Immanuelle/Demon King of the Sixth Heaven|qq=}}
| titlestyle = background:#767C6B; color:#fff;
| listclass = hlist
| image = [[File:Dairokuten jinjya (Natori, Miyagi) 01.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]]
| groupstyle = background:#8f9484; color:#fff;

 | group1 = Deities
 | list1 =
* {{ill|Omodaru and Ayakashikone|ja|阿夜訶志古泥神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omodaru and Ayakashikone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omodaru and Ayakashikone|qq=}} 
* {{ill|Demon King of the Sixth Heaven (Dairokuten Mao)|ja|天魔|1=Demon King of the Sixth Heaven|lt=Demon King of the Sixth Heaven|lt=Sixth Heavenly Demon King|lt_ja=第六天魔王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Demon King of the Sixth Heaven (Dairokuten Mao)|13=User:Immanuelle/Demon King of the Sixth Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Demon King of the Sixth Heaven (Dairokuten Mao)|13=User:Immanuelle/Demon King of the Sixth Heaven|qq=}}

| group2 = {{ill|Dairokuten Shrine|ja|第六天神社|lt=Dairokuten Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dairokuten Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dairokuten Shrine|qq=}}
| list2 = 
* {{ill|Dairokuten (Hannō)|ja|大六天 (飯能市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dairokuten (Hannō)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dairokuten (Hannō)|qq=}}

* {{ill|Dairokuten Sakaki Shrine|ja|第六天榊神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dairokuten Sakaki Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dairokuten Sakaki Shrine|qq=}}
* 
* {{ill|Dairokuten Shrine (Chigasaki)|ja|第六天神社 (茅ヶ崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dairokuten Shrine (Chigasaki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dairokuten Shrine (Chigasaki)|qq=}}
* {{ill|Dairokuten Shrine (Suginami)|ja|第六天神社 (杉並区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dairokuten Shrine (Suginami)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dairokuten Shrine (Suginami)|qq=}}
* {{ill|Musashi Dairokuten Shrine|ja|武蔵第六天神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musashi Dairokuten Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musashi Dairokuten Shrine|qq=}}
| group3 = other
|list3=
* {{ill|Dairokuten Kofun|ja|第六天古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dairokuten Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dairokuten Kofun|qq=}}

}}
<noinclude>

[[Category:Shinto cult templates]]
</noinclude><noinclude>

[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
